storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the massive scale of the forest threat by contrasting the small group of travelers against a vast, unnaturally quiet assembly of terrified wild animals. The visual language must shift from the dense, mossy enclosure of the ancient forest to an expansive clearing that feels overwhelmed by the sheer volume of diverse fauna.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (white clothing/dress)
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- Lion
- various forest beasts (tigers, elephants, bears, wolves, foxes)

## Required Environments
- ancient_forest_interior (thick mossy perimeter and central clearing)

## Continuity Constraints
- Animal placement within the clearing relative to one another
- Lighting consistency in the forest opening transition

## Beat List
- BT001: Travelers emerge from the thick forest into a clearing.
- BT002: Discovery of the massive animal gathering.
- BT003: Realization of the animals' terror and tension.
